name: Quaal's Feather Token, Whip
description:
This object looks like a feather.
You can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to throw the token to a point within 10 feet of yourself. The token disappears, and a floating whip takes its place. You can then take a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to make a melee spell attack against a creature within 10 feet of the whip, with an attack bonus of +9. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 1d6 + 5} Force damage.
